channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: What to watch in Tuesday’s primaries as Graham Platner tries to clinch Senate nomination in Maine
item.description: Voters across Maine, Nevada, South Carolina and North Dakota head to the polls for another day of primary elections in America.

item.title: Some host cities are aiming to house, not arrest, homeless people ahead of the World Cup
Jury deliberating in the trial of a Texas teen charged with murder in school track meet stabbing
